# SCShareableContentStyle.window

**Case**

The stream is currently presenting one or more windows.

## Declaration

```swift
case window
```

## Content styles

- **SCShareableContentStyle.application**: The stream is currently presenting one or more applications.
- **SCShareableContentStyle.display**: The stream is currently presenting a complete display.
- **SCShareableContentStyle.none**: The stream isn’t currently presenting any content.
